issues.title: MariaDB Vector
issues.body: Hello, I noticed a list of vector databases on the Spring AI framework page: https://spring.io/projects/spring-ai. I'm excited for MariaDB as they have released their MariaDB vector preview (see [project page](https://mariadb.org/projects/mariadb-vector/) and [blog](https://mariadb.org/vector-preview/)). How could MariaDB be added to the list? Thanks for any comments on this.

comments.body: Spring AI 1.0 has MariaDB Vector store: https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/vectordbs/mariadb.html
Please let us know if you would like to add anything specific to MariaDB Vector store. Feel free to contribute as well. Thanks!
